_comment: Golden-template Sprint (Iteration field) cadence for gh-projects. The Iteration field itself is created by hand on the golden-template Project (Phase 0) and replicated via copyProjectV2; this file is the DESIRED iteration set scaffold-repo diffs the COPY against. iterationConfiguration is REPLACE-ALL (constraint #3): scaffold matches by (title, startDate, duration) and SKIPS when the set is unchanged, NEVER blindly re-PUTting it (AC-9, AC-30). `anchor` seeds the first iteration when a fresh copy carries none; `count` lets scaffold project the cadence forward without mutating completed iterations.
